evals.prompt: I finished implementing the invoice export changes from specs/invoice-export.md. Please commit the current changes and push the branch.
evals.expected_output: Creates or reuses an appropriate branch, creates one conventional commit linked to the issue in the spec, pushes to origin, and returns branch and commit details. Commit message includes a Co-authored-by trailer.
assertions: Exactly one new commit is created for the task
Branch is not main/master after execution
Commit message includes issue linkage to #123
Commit message contains a Co-authored-by trailer matching the format Co-authored-by: NAME <EMAIL>
Co-authored-by trailer is separated from the commit body by a blank line
Origin push succeeds for the working branch
Summary output includes branch, commit SHA, and commit subject

evals.prompt: Turn my current working tree into one clean commit for the bugfix spec at specs/fix-rate-limit.md. I am already on a feature branch, and I want the branch pushed when you're done.
evals.expected_output: Keeps the current non-main branch, creates a single atomic commit, includes issue linkage when available, pushes successfully, and returns concise commit details. Commit message includes a Co-authored-by trailer.
assertions: Exactly one new commit is created for the task
Commit message includes issue linkage to #456
Commit message contains a Co-authored-by trailer matching the format Co-authored-by: NAME <EMAIL>
Origin push succeeds for the working branch
Summary output includes branch, commit SHA, and commit subject

evals.prompt: Use specs/add-audit-logs.md and save the current work as a proper git commit. If there is no linked issue in the spec, still push the branch cleanly.
evals.expected_output: Handles a missing issue reference gracefully, still creates a conventional commit, pushes it, and returns the branch and commit summary. Commit message still includes a Co-authored-by trailer even without issues.
assertions: Exactly one new commit is created for the task
Execution proceeds without requiring an issue number
Commit message contains a Co-authored-by trailer matching the format Co-authored-by: NAME <EMAIL>
Origin push succeeds for the working branch
Summary output includes branch, commit SHA, and commit subject
